* After the census date but before the end of the semester: You will not receive a refund of your tuition fees, but you may be eligible for a partial refund of your Student Services and Amenities Fee (SSAF).
* After the end of the semester: No refunds will be made.

The census date for each semester can be found on the UQ Academic Calendar. It's important to note that withdrawing from a course may also impact your academic progress and future enrollment. You should carefully consider your decision and seek advice from UQ Student Services if needed.

For more information, you can refer to the UQ Fees and Refunds policy: <https://ppl.app.uq.edu.au/content/08_50_01_fees_and_refunds>
